# t66 SEC (c15-class) — a poisoned on-disk type: must NEVER reach the shell via
# {{.Type}}: the emitter resolves the type against the trusted config vocabulary
# BEFORE expansion; a miss keeps the mutation and refuses the pipeline (exit 5).
exec mtt init
cp events.yaml .mtt/config.yaml
mkdir .mtt/tasks
cp poisoned.yaml .mtt/tasks/t1.yaml

! exec mtt tag add t1 marker
stderr 'not in config'
! exists pwned
exec mtt show t1
stdout 'marker'

-- poisoned.yaml --
id: t1
type: 'x"; touch pwned; "'
title: innocent
status: tbd
created: 2026-07-24T00:00:00Z
updated: 2026-07-24T00:00:00Z
-- events.yaml --
version: 1
project: {name: evtest}
events:
  task:
    update:
      post: ['echo type is {{.Type}}']
types:
  - name: task
    prefix: t
    default: true
    statuses:
      - {name: tbd, kind: initial}
      - {name: doing, kind: active}
      - {name: done, kind: terminal}
    transitions:
      - {from: tbd, to: doing}
      - {from: doing, to: done}
